inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 OCF $2,316M minus ~$450M capex [Assumption] on 1,151M diluted shares; haircut for divestiture-year noise (10-K FY2025)
inputs.normalization_note: Use operating cash flow not GAAP net income; FY2025 EPS inflated by portfolio gains

bear.notes: Revenue erosion + refinancing stress; EWSR savings delayed

base.notes: Stabilize base generics; $600-700M cost program to cash per 10-K EWSR

bull.notes: Mix shift to higher-margin brands + successful complex generics launches

stance_proposal.override_reason: Leveraged balance sheet and unproven post-portfolio moat cap stance despite partial dhando on cash yield

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Intangibles marked; equity low vs debt not hidden-asset pattern

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Eye Care and complex brands in segment mix; 10-K segment note

option_scan.question: Backlog not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Generic pharma revenue recognized on shipment

option_scan.question: Private / illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: Biocon Biologics collaboration stake post-2022 biosimilars contribution (10-K definitions)

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution / legal recovery?
option_scan.evidence: FY2025 divestiture gains in other income; excluded from normalized owner cash
option_scan.base_terminal_rationale: One-time portfolio sales not in 10-year run rate

option_scan.question: Embedded product option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Biosimilar pipeline economics flow through Generics segment over time

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Third-party confirms asset quality not in GAAP book; not full floor at spot price

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative
